stories.title: Bare feet, a Hamlet sculpture and quiet fire: How ...
stories.summary: In the biggest city in the NBA, the league's biggest man found a rare moment of peace -- and used it to drive his team back into an NBA Finals most experts said was over.

stories.title: Mahomes to make over $500M in reworked deal
stories.summary: The Chiefs are adding two years to Patrick Mahomes' contract in a reworked contract that ties him to Kansas City through 2033 at a value of $504.75 million, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: LeBron on GOAT debate: Taking nobody over me
stories.summary: LeBron James, when asked for his take on the basketball GOAT debate, said: "I'm not taking nobody over me."

stories.title: NC State mulling legal claims vs LSU over Wade
stories.summary: The timing of Will Wade's exit from NC State is the key factor in a letter from NC State indicating the school is investigating potential legal claims against LSU.

stories.title: Hocutt on Sorsby situation: 'No perfect answer'
stories.summary: Texas Tech athletic director Kirby Hocutt issued a lengthy statement on Wednesday, continuing to support quarterback Brendan Sorsby's recovery from an admitted gambling addiction while also not ruling out the possibility of him playing this season.
